# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: my-service
  namespace: my-namespace
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
  selector:
    app: my-service
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-service-server
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  service: my-service
  # Other server configuration options can be added here
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: my-service-auth
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  target:
    name: my-service
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespace: other-namespace
            name: other-service
      to:
        - target:
            service: my-service
            port: 80
